data.body: RESIDUAL full-neutrality (97f2, child of bbf1) IMPLEMENTED to complete epic AC3. Subagent extended Backend port (OutboundMapper.diff_fields/extract_field/assignee_matches/local_type_to_remote; SupportsLinks.link_type_for_relation; Backend.project + query_project; neutral BackendAssigneeNotFoundError; JiraBackend.assert_env_ready) and routed all 6 residual core sites (outbound_differ/outbound_links/fetcher/applier/apply_handlers/_attestation) through it — ZERO adapters.jira/acli_subprocess imports remain in core (AST neutrality gate). Validated independently: isolation clean, no test weakening (2 removed asserts migrated to leaf/injected-resolver equivalents), 1387 pass, whole-tree collection 7197/0-errors, teeth confirmed (breaking neutral-exception subclass -> assignee soft-fail RED), lint+typecheck+module-size green. Committed 1c95b44, rebased onto origin/main, env-docs amended, pushed Gerrit change 920. NEXT: 97f2 plan-review->sign->claim; 920 gates->merge; close 97f2; CLOSE EPIC bbf1 (AC3 now fully met).
